gameTitle: Desert Strike: Return to the Gulf

achievements.description: Destroy 2 radar sites in Campaign #1: Air Superiority

achievements.description: Destroy the power station in Campaign #1: Air Superiority

achievements.description: Destroy 2 airfields

achievements.description: Rescue at least 10 political prisoners from the jail

achievements.title: Lights Out in Scud Buster
achievements.description: Destroy the power station in Campaign #2: Scud Buster

achievements.description: Rescue 14 prisoners of war from the POW camp

achievements.description: Rescue a group of 6 captive U.N. inspectors

achievements.title: Disease Control
achievements.description: Destroy the secret biological weapons plant and capture the lead biochemist

achievements.description: Destroy the ICBM silos before they launch their missiles

achievements.description: Search and rescue 2 pilots who have been shot down over the Gulf

achievements.description: Destroy the power station in Campaign #3: Embassy City

achievements.title: Save Our Ships
achievements.description: Rescue 8 hostages who are being held in the Madman's yacht

achievements.title: A Commander of Rubble
achievements.description: Capture the enemy ambassador and destroy all 4 command centers
achievements.author: BlackZWolf

achievements.title: Emba-See You Never
achievements.description: Rescue all 12 officials who are being held captive by enemy terrorists

achievements.title: Tanks for Nothing
achievements.description: Airlift a group of 6 commandos to the oil fields and destroy all ZSUs nearby

achievements.title: Terror and Freedom Don't Mix
achievements.description: Stop the flow of oil spilling into the gulf
achievements.author: BlackZWolf

achievements.title: Helter-Shelter
achievements.description: Rescue at least 15 civilians who are being held captive in underground bomb shelters

achievements.description: Destroy the garbage trucks holding parts of a nuclear bomb

achievements.description: Destroy the nuclear plant and capture the Madman's nuclear scientist

achievements.description: Destroy the power station in Campaign #4: Nuclear Storm
